name: Zoho Weekly Recruitment Report - v3 Local AI

parameters.jsCode:
const payload = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { jsonText: JSON.stringify(payload, null, 2) } }];

parameters.command: docker run --rm -v /opt/stacks/n8n/n8n_data:/work python:3.12-alpine sh -lc "pip install openpyxl >/tmp/pip.log && python /work/scripts/fill_weekly_recruitment_template.py"

parameters.subject: =📊 Zoho Weekly Recruitment Report - {{$("Set Report Date Range").first().json.report_label}}
parameters.html:
=Hello Alfredo,

Please find attached the Zoho Weekly Recruitment Report for the period of {{$("Set Report Date Range").first().json.report_label}}.

Best regards,
Talent Acquisition Team
